item.title: About
item.description: By training, I’m ingineer in image and signal processing and PhD in robotics. I’m now a free software developer because I believe this model to be way more ethical than proprietary softwares. I believe most english readers will be fellow developers so I won’t spend much time on it but it is, as you probably know, way more difficult to make a living by creating free softwares than by creating proprietary ones.

item.title: Contact
item.description: If you have a question on a specific project, the best way to get my attention is to open a github issue in the relevant repository. If you are not a github user or for anything else, feel free to contact me at : thibaut.tezenas(at)protonmail.com

item.title: Projects
item.description: Demarches-villages.fr : an online formalities for small municipalities I couldn’t find a simple online formalities solution dedicated to the small municipalities so I created a service : demarches-villages.fr. During the conception, the emphasis was on the simplicity. One of the main goal was to limit as much as possible the inscription duration for the cities. By doing so, I hopefully encourage a maximum of cities that currently doesn’t use an online formalities solution due to their complexity to offer this service to their constituents.
